ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game (e.g., SEA@CAR) */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time when the game starts */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the game is played */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., scheduled, in progress, finished) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_stats" (
  "stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's game statistics */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* Reference to the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "starting" TEXT /* Indicates if the player is starting or not */,
  "performance_score" REAL /* Performance score of the player for the game */,
  "passing_yards" INTEGER /* Passing yards for the game */,
  "passing_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Passing touchdowns for the game */,
  "rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Rushing yards for the game */,
  "rushing_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Rushing touchdowns for the game */,
  "receiving_yards" INTEGER /* Receiving yards for the game */,
  "receiving_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Receiving touchdowns for the game */,
  "interceptions_thrown" INTEGER /* Interceptions thrown for the game */,
  "sacks" INTEGER /* Sacks for the game */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Tackles for the game */,
  "sacks_allowed" INTEGER /* Sacks allowed for the game */,
  "fumbles_lost" INTEGER /* Fumbles lost for the game */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player game stats record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player game stats record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_schedule" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game schedule */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the opponent team */,
  "week_number" INTEGER /* Week number of the game in the season */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game schedule record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game schedule record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_schedule_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_schedule_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_schedule_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* Reference to the player */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Estimated recovery date */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., knee, ankle) */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "injury_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the injury */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the player's return (e.g., day-to-day, out for the season) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the injury record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the injury record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* Reference to the player */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the salary is applicable */,
  "salary_amount" REAL /* Salary amount */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., guaranteed, non-guaranteed) */,
  "bonus_amount" REAL /* Bonus amount */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the salary record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the salary record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fantasy team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the fantasy team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team is part of */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the fantasy team's logo */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the fantasy team */,
  "team_value" REAL /* Current value of the fantasy team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user team record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user team record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_teams_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES league ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., player, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "league" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the league */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the league */,
  "league_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the league's logo */,
  "league_description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  "entry_fee" REAL /* Entry fee for the league */,
  "prize_pool" REAL /* Total prize pool for the league */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the league record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the league record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* Reference to the player involved in the transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell, trade) */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_value" REAL /* Value of the transaction */,
  "transaction_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
